description: Style Note This stylish purse from pieces is the right accessory choice when you want to add a dash of kistch to your monochrome ensemble. Wear this to snazz up a plain ensemble or match it with a bohemian look! Product Details Rectangle canvas purse with floral print and faux leather trims Fabric lining One main zippered compartment Material and Care Canvas Wipe with a clean cloth to remove dust Size Dimensions: 17 cm x 11 cm
